title: LlmConfig
description: Custom LLM provider configuration for a Brand Kit.

provider.description: Name of the LLM provider (e.g., openai, anthropic, azure_openai).

model.description: The specific LLM model to use for content generation.

api_key_configured.description: Indicates whether a valid API key has been configured.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the LLM configuration was set.
